title: lagrezia spathulata
intro: Lagrezia spathulata, also known as 'Himalayan Sandwort', is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Lagrezia spathulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
